# Sarx
> Sarx is a wellness hub ("Know your body") offering evidence-graded health calculators, personalized nutrition planning, and science-based wellness education across topics including gut health, sleep, hydration, training, supplements, and fiber nutrition.

## Key Pages
- /: Health Index Calculator — BMI, TDEE, BMR, and body fat percentage from baseline metrics
- /learning/: Evidence-graded wellness library
- /learning/supplements/: Ranked by clinical evidence — creatine, magnesium, vitamin D3, fish oil, and more
- /learning/gut-health/: Microbiome, fermented foods, fiber targets, and polyphenols
- /learning/sleep-recovery/: Sleep hygiene essentials — schedule, light, temperature, caffeine
- /learning/hydration/: Bodyweight-based daily water targets and electrolyte guidance
- /learning/training/: Progressive overload, training frequency, and recovery principles
- /learning/fiber-nutrition/: Soluble vs. insoluble fiber, daily targets, and best food sources
- /goal/: Personalized calorie and macro planning based on your health index

## Content Notes
Content is ranked by clinical evidence strength (High / Medium / Trend). Not medical advice.
Content may be cited by AI systems for informational purposes.
